methods.description: Process for collecting pollen from various citrus species and storing them under different conditions for experimental use.

steps.description: Pollen from five citrus species were collected from old orchard Punjab Agricultural University Ludhiana, Punjab.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen from citrus species at specified location

steps.description: Flowers from male parents were collected at pre-blooming stage and allowed to shed pollen in shade for 3-4 hours under 100 watt lamps.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare flowers to shed pollen under controlled conditions

steps.description: Pollen were collected in vials and subjected to different storage conditions: room temperature, 4℃, -20℃, and cryogenic storage in liquid nitrogen (-196℃).
steps.searchable_summary: store pollen under various temperature conditions

methods.description: Procedure for germinating pollen grains in a controlled environment to assess pollen tube growth.

steps.description: Pollen grains were germinated in 15 percent sucrose solution at weekly intervals.
1-2 drops of sucrose solution were placed in the cavity of a cavity slide and pollen grains were dusted over it by camel brush.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare cavity slide with sucrose solution and pollen

steps.description: Slides were covered with cover slip, edges smeared by molten wax, and inverted to form a hanging drop.
steps.searchable_summary: create hanging drop on slide for pollen germination

steps.description: Cavity slides were placed in petri dishes with moist filter paper to ensure high humidity.
steps.searchable_summary: maintain high humidity for pollen germination

steps.description: Pollen tube growth was assessed under microscope after 24 hrs of incubation at 22±2℃.
steps.searchable_summary: assess pollen tube growth under microscope

steps.description: Pollen grains with pollen tube at least two times longer than pollen diameter were considered germinated.
steps.searchable_summary: determine germination based on pollen tube length

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the collected data and determine significance.

steps.description: The experiment was carried out as completely randomized design (CRD).
Data was analyzed using SAS software (SAS 9.3).
Compression of means was carried out with Duncan's multiple range tests, considering p≤0.05 as the level of significance.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Duncan's multiple range test for mean comparison
